goals.title: Finish 20K Trail Race
goals.description: Train consistently to complete a 20 km trail race, focusing on endurance, elevation gain, and pacing strategy.

goals.title: Get Motorcycle License
goals.description: Complete all required training and testing to obtain a full motorcycle license, including road safety and riding skills.

goals.title: Solo Long Hike/Run
goals.description: Plan and complete a long solo hiking or trail running day, focusing on navigation, endurance, and self-reliance.

goals.title: Complete First Aid Course
goals.description: Take and successfully complete a certified first aid course to be prepared for emergencies in daily life and outdoors.

goals.title: Finish iPhone SE Soldering
goals.description: Complete the iPhone SE hardware repair project, including precise soldering work and restoring full device functionality.

goals.title: Get Married
goals.description: Organize and celebrate a meaningful wedding, ensuring all legal, personal, and logistical aspects are thoughtfully handled.

goals.title: Pass French B2 Exam
goals.description: Reach B2 proficiency in French and successfully pass a recognized language exam with strong speaking and writing skills.

goals.title: Reach 73kg Lean Physique
goals.description: Achieve a body weight of 73 kg with no more than 10% body fat through consistent training, diet, and recovery.

goals.title: Visit 10 New Places
goals.description: Explore and experience at least 10 new locations, focusing on variety, culture, and memorable experiences.

goals.title: Multi-Day Mountain Hike
goals.description: Plan and complete a multi-day hiking trip in the mountains, including logistics, gear preparation, and route planning.

goals.title: Create Year Film
goals.description: Document and produce a short film summarizing the year, including key moments, achievements, and reflections.

goals.title: Bench Press Body Weight
goals.description: Train consistently to achieve a bench press equal to your body weight with proper form and control.

goals.title: Standup Open Mic
goals.description: Prepare and perform a standup comedy set at an open mic, focusing on writing, timing, and delivery.

goals.title: Self-Host Online Presence
goals.description: Migrate personal and professional online services to self-hosted solutions for greater control and privacy.

goals.title: Learn Basic Car Maintenance
goals.description: Understand and perform essential car maintenance tasks like oil changes, tire replacement, and basic diagnostics.

goals.title: Cold Exposure Challenge
goals.description: Safely build tolerance to cold exposure through activities like cold showers or winter swims.

goals.title: Camping Trip Solo
goals.description: Plan and complete a solo camping trip, focusing on independence, preparation, and outdoor survival basics.

goals.title: Digital Detox Week
goals.description: Spend a full week with minimal digital distractions, focusing on real-world experiences and mental clarity.

goals.title: Read 12 Books
goals.description: Read at least 12 meaningful books across different areas such as philosophy, psychology, and personal development.
